name: com.unity.ide.antigravity
description: Antigravity IDE integration for Unity. Adds Google Antigravity IDE (the VS Code-based code editor in the Antigravity product line) as an External Script Editor option, generates .csproj/.sln for IntelliSense, and offers single-instance window reuse. Detects Antigravity IDE specifically and ignores the standalone Antigravity 2.0 agent app.

_upm.changelog:
Added:

- Troubleshooting / FAQ section in README covering the most common Antigravity 2.0 split symptoms.
- Comparison table vs the other community Antigravity packages, with last-push and Antigravity-2.0-fix status as of May 2026.
- Deep-dive doc Documentation~/antigravity-2-0-fix.md explaining what changed at I/O 2026, why script opens started routing to the agent app, and the three-layer fix in this package.
- Issue forms (bug report, feature request), PR template, SECURITY.md, CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md (Contributor Covenant 3.0) and CITATION.cff.
